**Replace issue name "M00-LAB00: QUICK_DESCRIPTION" with the correct lab and short description**
Example: **M03-LAB13: Fix Conditional Access policy step**

---

## Related Issue

Link the related GitHub issue:  
Fixes #<issue-number>
